description_long: This object depicts a distorted adult pedestrian figure with exaggeratedly elongated limbs and angular, stretched body parts. The head is relatively normal in proportion, featuring a human face with short hair, but the arms and legs are unnaturally extended and twisted, creating a surreal, almost abstract appearance. The clothing appears to be a loose, long-sleeved top and pants, with the fabric following the extreme deformations of the limbs. The feet and hands are visible but also affected by the stretching, making them appear misshapen. The overall form is humanoid but highly stylized, with sharp, planar surfaces and a lack of realistic anatomical structure. This figure would stand out in any urban environment due to its unusual and unsettling proportions.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated, angular limbs and a stylized, abstract body. The head and face are human-like, but the rest of the form is stretched and twisted.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and the extreme stretching of both arms outward, with one leg bent and visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the head and the dramatic extension of the arms and legs, with angular, intersecting limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and the continuation of the elongated arms and legs, with less facial detail visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the head and the exaggerated, angular limbs extending in multiple directions.
attribute_posture: seated with limbs extended and twisted
